steps.title: Find the similarity clue
steps.content:
Both are scientists studying living organisms
Morris studies insects (wheat flies, cicadas); Snethlage studies birds (Brazilian birds). This shared focus on living things is the key signal for a similarity emphasis.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B frames both scientists as dedicated to studying living organisms, directly reflecting the similarity signal.
The other three either highlight differences, are too general, or explicitly contrast the two, missing the similarity.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
